Call ID: EXT-016
Type: external
Date: 2026-03-26
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Carlos (account manager); Grace (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Carlos): Hi Grace, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Grace): We love the core product but the integrations feel limited.
AM (Carlos): Let me connect you with our product team for a feedback session.
Customer (Grace): We've had a mixed experience, to be candid.
AM (Carlos): I'll flag the usability feedback; we're actively investing there.
Customer (Grace): This was helpful. Let's keep the momentum going.
AM (Carlos): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
